content.en:
The territory where the primeval golden turtle clan is located is called the primeval turtle sea.

The Ancient Turtle Sea is a very precious treasure in the gap between the territorial waters, and it was also taken by the Ancient Golden Turtle Clan from another race at the expense of the Primeval Turtle Clan.

After that, it was renamed the Ancient Turtle Sea.

Originally, the Ancient Turtle Sea had a complete piece of Ancient Treasure Land.

The fragment occupied by the Vajra Serpent Clan was only a fragment of the Ancient Treasure Land, but it was a larger fragment.

A race like the Vajra Serpent Clan is not qualified to occupy a complete piece of Ancient Treasure Land, if it dares to occupy it, if it does not have the strength to defend it, it will be snatched up by other powerful races the next day.

Therefore, the Vajra snake clan only dared to occupy a large fragment.

However, the current Ancient Turtle Sea, an ancient treasure land, had been shattered because of the battle, and in fact, the ancient treasure land had been cracked a long time ago.

After the last time, the Ancient Golden Turtle Clan pried away the most precious area, so the Ancient Turtle Sea, an ancient treasure land, had long been a fragment.

Today, it has become a dense fragment of debris, and it has lost its original glory.

......

"It's here!"

Ye Tian came to the Ancient Turtle Sea and saw pieces of fragments, and at the same time, he also saw a lot of Blood Transformation Realm creatures.

But.

Since there was only a war here, and even a battle involving the seven Blood Transformation Realms, the void here was filled with traces of power left by the Seven Blood Transformation Realms.

If you are not careful, it will trigger the traces of the power of the Seven Blood Transformation Realms, and it is easy to be severely injured or even killed.

Therefore, the creatures of the Blood Transformation Realm who came here did not dare to trespass, and they were all cautious looking for good things here.

Swish!

Ye Tian flew directly over and landed on a piece of debris.

"Nothing!"

Ye Tian immediately left and went to look for other fragments.

The Ancient Turtle Sea Fragments certainly didn't have a lot of resources, but the Ancient Golden Turtle Clan was very clever in withdrawing and must have left some good things behind, and if they found an incomparably precious resource, it would be enough.

Many of the fragments here are not harvested, although there may be some ordinary resources, but they are of little use to the creatures of the Blood Transformation Realm, and it is a waste of time to collect them.

Soon.

Ye Tian found a good resource.

"An Ancient Golden Fruit Tree!"

At this time, although the primeval golden fruit tree was dilapidated, as if it was about to die, six primeval golden fruits still grew on it.

"Taigu Golden Fruit, I remember that in White Elephant City, it was 10,000 White Elephant Gold!"

And here are six primeval golden fruits, that is, sixty thousand white elephant gold.

This is also a big harvest for Ye Tian!

"Taikoo Golden Fruit !!!"

A creature of the Four-Time Blood Transformation Realm also discovered this place and saw the six primeval golden fruits.

However.

Ye Tian was the first to see it, and he reacted quickly, so he rushed over as soon as possible.

Click!!!

The six Ancient Golden Fruits were directly forcibly picked by Ye Tian, and the four-time Blood Transformation Realm creature was a little slower.

"Hand over the Ancient Golden Fruit!"

The four-time Blood Transformation Realm creature intercepted Ye Tian and threatened.

"Get out of here!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

Rumble!!!

The battle began instantly.

That four-time Blood Transformation Realm creature was indeed very powerful, and its strength was above Ye Tian, after all, Ye Tian was only comparable to the weaker Fourth Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

However, everyone was in the Heavenly Ancestor realm of the Blood Transformation Realm four times, so the other party could only suppress Ye Tian at most, and they couldn't kill him at all.

"Boundary-breaking genius!"

The four-time Blood Transformation Realm creature hesitated for a moment, but left directly.

After all, you can't kill Ye Tian, and it's just a waste of time to continue fighting.

"It's better to go!"

Ye Tian didn't want to fight with such a four-time Blood Transformation Realm creature.

Subsequently, he continued to search for treasure resources.

......

In this area of the Ancient Turtle Sea Fragments, battles often break out, and as long as a precious treasure is discovered, a battle is inevitable.

It can be said that only if you are strong can you keep the resources and treasures you find, otherwise you will definitely be robbed, and even your life will not be guaranteed.

However, there are no six-time Blood Transformation Realm creatures here, and the most powerful estimate is only five Blood Transformation Realm creatures.

Therefore, those creatures of the Six Blood Transformation Realm knew very well that the resources that were useful to them would definitely have been taken away by the Ancient Golden Turtle Clan a long time ago, and it was impossible to keep them.

The remaining resources are of some help to the creatures of the Blood Transformation Realm at most, so they will not put down their subordinates to compete for this resource.

In a large fragment of the Ancient Turtle Sea, several creatures of the Five Blood Transformation Realm were fighting.

"Get out of here, I found this Xuangang Crystal Essence, you don't want to take it away!"

A Vajra snake at the peak of the five-time Blood Transformation Realm grew in size and protected a mountain peak, and there happened to be a piece of Xuangang crystal essence inside the mountain peak.

However, it would take some time to take the Xuangang Crystal.

And the few creatures around him who were in the Five Blood Transformation Realm didn't give it time to take away the Xuangang Crystal Essence at all.

"The Xuangang Crystal Essence belongs to the Ancient Golden Turtle Clan, not your Vajra Snake Clan!" A white dragon sneered: "I saw this fragment first, it is directly mine, so the treasures in the fragment are also mine, and it is you who should roll!"

Thundered!!!!

The battle broke out!

Where is the Vajra Snake is the opponent of these five blood transformation realms, one against a few can't be defeated at all.

Soon, the King Kong snake was injured.

And more and more Blood Transformation Realm creatures rushed here, but the weaker Blood Transformation Realm creatures didn't dare to come over at all, and only dared to watch around.

At this time, Ye Tian also came.

"It turned out to be the Xuangang Crystal Essence, this treasure is very valuable!"

According to the transaction price of the White Elephant City, the Xuangang Crystal Essence is calculated according to the square, and the Xuangang Crystal Essence is worth 600,000 White Elephant Gold.

Although I don't know how big the Xuangang Crystal Essence is here, it is absolutely extremely precious!

Ye Tian was also very excited, if he snatched the Xuangang Crystal Essence, maybe he would be able to gather enough Dragon Gold Blood to help him complete the third blood transformation, and thus become the Heavenly Ancestor of the Third Blood Transformation Realm.

It's a pity that he doesn't have this strength.

Each of these five Blood Transformation Realm creatures could easily kill him, and if he dared to go up and snatch it, there would be no hope at all, and he would have to die.

He didn't care about losing a replica body, but the resources on his body were gone.

Therefore, he can only watch the excitement here.

Soon.

The Vajra snake of the Five Blood Transformation Realm escaped, and it was impossible for him to sacrifice his life for the Xuangang Crystal Essence.

And the other five Blood Transformation Realm creatures fought each other, and they were also competing for the Xuangang Crystal Essence.

Abrupt.

A white giant elephant appeared in the void.

Its terrifying aura caused the surrounding void to solidify, and the faces of several five-stage Blood Transformation Realm creatures also changed.

"Ji Heng of the White Shadow Elephant Clan, why is he here!"
